typography.anti_default_rule: Inter is strictly BANNED for headings.

headings.style: Strong Condensed, font-black for numbers, font-light for subheadings

general_rules: No jagged bottoms. Use h-full on children.
Containers must use 1px solid stroke with no soft shadows.
Override default stretch on grid if needed, but here we want items to stretch and fill.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#00BFFF] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.emergency: bg-[#FF3B30] text-[#FFFFFF] hover:bg-[#D63028] hover:text-[#FFFFFF] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm animate-pulse shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,59,48,0.5)] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/10 rounded-sm transition-colors

forms_inputs.input_field: bg-[#1A1D24] border border-white/10 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] focus:border-transparent rounded-sm h-12
forms_inputs.label: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-[#8A94A6] mb-2 block

components.emergency_banner: If battery < 15%, display a full-width top banner bg-[#FF3B30]/10 border-b border-[#FF3B30] text-[#FF3B30] py-3 flex items-center justify-center font-mono tracking-widest uppercase animate-pulse

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicitly set hover text colors. e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white
animations: Staggered entrance for the station list.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Add aria-hidden to decorative icons.

ai_card_background.description: High-tech digital interface background. Use with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/70) so text is highly readable.

station_thumbnail_2.description: Row of Tesla charging stations illuminated at night.

map.strategy: Use React Leaflet with a dark map tile provider (e.g., CartoDB.DarkMatter: 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png'). Container should have sharp borders (rounded-sm) and border-white/10.

technical_requirements.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format indicating role (e.g., data-testid="booking-submit-btn").
technical_requirements.component_imports: Use standard Shadcn UI components but heavily override their classes to remove soft shadows and rounded-xl corners. Convert them to flat, 1px border, rounded-sm.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a deep dark theme using the Performance Pro archetype. The background must be #0A0A0A.
Do not use generic blue 'SaaS' colors. Stick to the provided neon/volt blue (#00E5FF) for active states and red (#FF3B30) for emergency states.
The layout must feel like a tactical command center: tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6), dense data representation using JetBrains Mono, and sharp, 1px bordered containers.
Embed the 'ai_card_background' image into the Center BIG CARD with a bg-black/70 overlay to ensure text contrast. This card should feel like the glowing 'brain' of the dashboard.
Implement the Leaflet map with dark tiles and ensure the map container matches the UI's border styling.
When battery drops below 15%, the UI must shift its accent colors to red and show a pulsing emergency banner.
Ensure all fonts (Chivo, JetBrains Mono, Manrope) are imported and applied correctly according to the typography section.
Do not forget to add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
